news.t: Nicholas Wealth Launches GLDN and SLVX as Income-Focused Precious Metals ETFs

overview.description: The Nicholas Silver Income ETF (SLVX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund actively manages a portfolio composed of silver companies, silver commodities, and options overlay. The funds selection process is based on valuation, implied volatility, company fundamentals, and macroeconomic factors, including real interest rates and inflation SLVX was launched on Feb 18, 2026 and is issued by Nicholas.

data.title: Nicholas Wealth Launches GLDN and SLVX as Income-Focused Precious Metals ETFs
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $GLDN--XFUNDS by Nicholas Wealth, a leading provider of actively-managed income ETFs, today announced the launch of two new ETFs: the Nicholas Gold Income ETF (NYSE Arca: ...
